pair.title: Nibe S configuration
pair.not_connected: Not connected to the heat pump

detect.title: Detecting features
detect.intro: Connecting to the heat pump and watching which values change. This takes about half a minute.
detect.failed: Could not read from the heat pump

features.title: Select features
features.intro: Choose which features to monitor. Recommendations are based on what the heat pump reported.
features.insights_note: Disabling a feature removes its capabilities, including their Insights history.
